rules: This is a private personal-use project. Internal owner review, human review, creative approval, license-review, voice-review, and source-runtime gates are pre-authorized by the project owner and must not block local generation, QA, tracker promotion, or local completion.

Commercial distribution, public release, rights-holder approval, publication approval, or account-owner acceptance must not be treated as required unless the project scope is explicitly changed to public/commercial release.
Generated or recorded audio assets must be stored outside the source package.

Every promoted audio asset should preserve lightweight provenance when available: source or generator, model or engine, prompt or workflow, output path, size, hash, timestamp, and private personal-use scope.

Placeholder manifests do not constitute real generated audio evidence. True blockers are limited to missing credentials, missing models/assets, failed runtime loading, failed generation, failed QA, missing provenance, secret/security risk, EC2/runtime failure, unavailable external service, or missing playable output.
